chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5119 of 2025 [Laiq Ahmed Shah versus NEPRA and others] Petitioner: Laiq Ahmed Shah son of Nehmat Shah through Mr. Matloob Hussain Qureshi, Advocate. Date of hearing: 01-12-2025 Date of decision: 01-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Petitioner is aggrieved of an exorbitant bill received from the K-Electric which includes charge of alleged theft of electricity. On the query of the Court, counsel concedes that the Petitioner has not approached Electric Inspector under the Electricity Act, 1910. Since the remedy of the Petitioner is before Electric Inspector as aforesaid, the petition is dismissed in limine alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
